mapper.select: SELECT id, standard_id AS standardId, material_code_id AS materialCodeId, inbound_request_id AS inboundRequestId, material_code AS materialCode, material_name AS materialName, material_sub_category AS materialSubCategory, model_specification AS modelSpecification, quantity, quantity_unit AS quantityUnit, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM maintenance_standard_tool WHERE standard_id = #{standardId} ORDER BY id DESC
